text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day has finally come for the classic race that
decides the Ruler of the Mile—the NHK Mile Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With over a hundred thousand viewers gathered,
the atmopshere is completely different.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-what's happening?! All the precious Umas
appear so poised to slay on today's racecourse!
What have I done to deserve this experience?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: It's incredible! It's divine! I so don't belong here!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Nevertheless, inadequate as I may be, the
exhilarating rush from experiencing this firsthand
is—hrgnkh! My heart!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
At this point, I couldn't say one way or another.
Being here surrounded by all these talented
Umas... It's like a dream come true.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Here I am, at last, witnessing the beauty and awe
of the whole scene in such high resolution...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But I want to find it. I have to find it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I have to get to the bottom of what makes
Umamusume so blessed and find exactly where
their sparkle comes from!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Even if it means I must be purified in their divine
aura.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Was somebody watching me just now? I've got
this tickling sense that someone's nearby...
choice_data_list: It doesn't seem like anyone's staring at you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Really? As unbelievable as it may seem, it felt
like... in the midst of my simping, I myself was
being simped...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait! I can't afford to be distracted!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day I must discover the secret to
Umamusume glory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a race this big, the competition is bound to
be top-notch. Sensing something from the
impressive lineup of first-rate runners, this
all-rounder gears up to show what she's got.
